sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى وَكَالَةِ السَّفَرِ لِحَجْزِ رِحْلَةٍ منظَّمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u putničku agenciju da rezervišem organizirano putovanje.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the travel agency to book an organised trip.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرْتُ الْمُوَظَّفَةَ بِمَيْزَانِيَّتِي وَعَدَدِ الأَيَّامِ الَّتِي أُرِيدُهَا.
sentences.translation: Rekao sam službenici svoj budžet i broj dana koji želim.
sentences.translationEn: I told the agent my budget and the number of days I wanted.

sentences.arabic: عَرَضَتْ عَلَيَّ عِدَّةَ بَرَامِجَ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ فَاخْتَرْتُ الأَنْسَبَ.
sentences.translation: Ponudila mi je nekoliko različitih programa pa sam izabrao najprikladniji.
sentences.translationEn: She offered me several different packages and I chose the most suitable.

sentences.arabic: تَضَمَّنَتِ الرِّحْلَةُ الطَّيَرَانَ وَالْفُنْدُقَ وَالنَّقْلَ مِنَ الْمَطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje je uključivalo avion, hotel i prijevoz s aerodroma.
sentences.translationEn: The trip included flights, a hotel, and airport transfers.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الِاسْتِعْدَادُ بِمُسَاعَدَةِ الْوَكَالَةِ أَسْهَلَ بِكَثِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Priprema uz pomoć agencije bila je mnogo lakša.
sentences.translationEn: Preparing with the agency's help was much easier.
